loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy consumed for the month; per-unit efficiency, subsidy limits, and targets are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: one or more leaves could not be bound for this card on this asset — those leaves render an honest blank (per-leaf reasons attached), every other leaf fills

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and derived energy loss/efficiency — per-phase energy isn't measured for this asset; lossPct used for deltaPct as no dedicated 'loss pct of input' fn exists.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load and load factor — expected load, range, and anomaly counts are not measured by this asset.
